name: Metacognition — 破界
description: 每天一件认知之外的事。认知科学、哲学、投资、陌生领域，跳出思维舒适区。
description_en: Horizon Journal — One cognitive horizon, expanded daily. Science, philosophy, investing, unfamiliar domains.

editions.title: 大脑是一台幻觉机器 — 预测加工理论如何颠覆认知
editions.title_en: Your Brain Is a Hallucination Engine — How Predictive Processing Rewrites Cognition
